images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese gravure idol exuding a dangerous, edgy biker aesthetic on a rooftop parking lot at golden hour. She is captured in a side profile shot, wearing an oversized, textured grey hoodie partially slipped off one shoulder to reveal a delicate strap, paired with denim hot pants that accentuate her long, toned legs. She is leaning intimately against a parked motorcycle, holding her smartphone up for a mirror selfie, her expression captured in a moment of whispering a secret with parted, glossy lips and a seductive gaze. The scene is bathed in warm, golden tones with a projector overlay pattern casting sharp, artistic geometric shadows across her flawless skin and the sleek bike. The background is a beautifully blurred bokeh of the city skyline, emphasizing the subject. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, hyper-detailed fabric texture, natural skin pores, cinematic lighting.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup

She is wearing a form-fitting, silky loungewear set in a soft champagne hue, the smooth fabric clinging to her slim waist and ample chest, delicate lace trim accentuating her curves. The background is a blurred, sunlit modern kitchen, creating a creamy bokeh that highlights her figure.
